---
title: "Getting Started with grayleafspotr"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with grayleafspotr}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(grayleafspotr)
```

## Load example results

```{r}
run <- example_grayleafspot_results()
run$results
```

## Make template plots

```{r}
plot_colony_expansion(run)
plot_growth_roughness(run)
plot_stress_remodeling(run)
plot_texture_organization(run)
plot_shape_vs_stress(run)
plot_feature_heatmap(run)
```

## Run analysis

```{r eval=FALSE}
grayleafspot_analyze(
  input_dir = "input_images/06FEB",
  output_dir = "outputs",
  run_name = "my_run",
  engine_model = "localunet"
)
```

## Read saved outputs

```{r eval=FALSE}
read_grayleafspot_results("outputs/20260427T120000Z_localunet")
```
